hooks.command: REPO="/home/bc/repos/github/bonomani/ariaflow-server"; jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; case "$f" in "$REPO"/*|"$REPO") ;; *) echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Write blocked: file is outside the ariaflow-server repo"}'; exit 0;; esac; }

jq -r '.tool_input.command' | { read -r cmd; src_changed=$(git diff --cached --name-only -- 'src/' 2>/dev/null | grep -c '\.py$' || true); test_changed=$(git diff --cached --name-only -- 'tests/' 2>/dev/null | grep -c '\.py$' || true); if [ "$src_changed" -gt 0 ] && [ "$test_changed" -eq 0 ]; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Source files in src/ changed but no test files in tests/ changed. Add tests before committing."}'; fi; }
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.py) ruff check "$f" 2>&1 || true;; esac; }
